docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,174.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT MATTIOLO, THALIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-24-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SHERRY ZHONG, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT THALIA MATTIOLO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SHERRY ZHONG, SR.COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
